summary: Rich travel journal with photo and video uploads, text notes, location tagging, mood tracking, and media organization
discoveries: Implementation plan created with 10 phases covering all acceptance criteria from spec
Database will use Supabase for storage and PostgreSQL for data
Media compression required to prevent crashes when adding photos (addressing pain-2-2)
Offline-first approach with sync to address poor connectivity during travel
Rich text editor needed to avoid clunky experience (addressing pain-4-2)
next_steps: Begin Phase 1: Create database migrations for journal tables
Set up storage buckets with proper RLS policies
Define TypeScript types for all journal entities
